## JS SDK Changes

### Description
Brief description of changes to the JavaScript/TypeScript SDK

### Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring

### Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have run `bun run fmt` and committed any formatting changes
- [ ] I have run `bun run lint` and fixed any linting issues
- [ ] I have run `bun run type-check` and resolved any type errors
- [ ] I have run `bun run test` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings

### Breaking Changes
<!-- If this PR contains breaking changes, describe the impact and migration path -->

### Test Coverage
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated
- [ ] Browser compatibility verified (if applicable)

### Additional Notes
<!-- Any additional information that reviewers should know -->
